title: Go DB and images export local candidate
scope: Local/copied-DB-and-data DB download and images zip export candidate.
implemented_behavior: DB export serves the copied SQLite DB file with the Python-compatible backup filename pattern.
Images export accepts images plus note_title, caps requests at 100 images, resolves static/uploads references safely under PRISM_GO_DATA_DIR/static/uploads, and returns a zip bundle.
Unsafe, missing, or non-regular image paths are skipped without escaping the data directory.
The export surface is grouped under the import/export flag because later production promotion must validate data movement and backup semantics together.
production_boundary: Production owner remains Python. This local copied candidate does not deploy Pi, edit Caddy/systemd, change frontend defaults, touch production DB/files, remove Python, or promote live/default DB/images export ownership.
